name: Vanilla Wafers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, use an electric mixer to cream together the butter and Crisco until smooth.
2. Add the sugar and salt, mixing well.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Gradually mix in the flour until the dough is well combined.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Flatten each piece slightly with the back of a fork or knife.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 8-10 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned.
9. Remove from the cookie sheet while still hot.
